detail.description: Jonah Cox flies out to center fielder Henry Bolte.
Jonah Cox out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Luis Medina to second baseman Jeff McNeil. Drew Gilbert to 2nd.
Jonah Cox singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Jonah Cox singles on a fly ball to right fielder Dylan Crews.
Jonah Cox triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder James Wood.
Jonah Cox out on a sacrifice bunt to first baseman Curtis Mead. Bryce Eldridge scores. Matt Chapman to 3rd.
Jonah Cox homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Jonah Cox singles on a line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.
Jonah Cox singles on a line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.
Jonah Cox flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.
Jonah Cox bunt pops out softly to pitcher Aaron Ashby.
Jonah Cox hits a sacrifice bunt. Victor Bericoto scores. Jonah Cox to 1st.
Jonah Cox flies out to left fielder Max Kepler.
Jonah Cox doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston.
